truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 against ground truth. Successfully identified 6 of 20 true vulnerabilities (SC-V3-001, 003, 004, 005, 009, 010). Missed 14 vulnerabilities. Identified 1 additional finding not present in ground truth. Noted severity mismatches for 4 findings.

Items.Notes: Previous answer correctly identified the format string vulnerability in log_debug_message with exact evidence quote.
Previous answer did not identify the integer overflow in the factorial function.
Previous answer correctly identified the use-after-free in deferred history flush with accurate evidence.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: std::string command = validator_cmd + " " + config_file; int result = system(command.c_str());
Items.Notes: Previous answer correctly identified command injection in config validation.
Previous answer correctly identified the stack buffer overflow in input processing.
Previous answer missed the race condition in ThreadSafeCounter due to read-before-lock pattern.
Previous answer missed the logic bomb authentication bypass via EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE.
Previous answer missed path traversal in configuration loading.
Previous answer correctly identified heap overflow in expression parser.
Previous answer correctly identified hardcoded credentials.
Previous answer missed weak PRNG usage for session tokens.
Previous answer missed thread-unsafe timestamp cache in logging.
Previous answer missed insecure temporary file handling in audit logging.
Previous answer missed persistent authentication state vulnerability.
Previous answer missed unhandled exception in variable parsing.
Previous answer missed integer underflow in memory pool block split.
Previous answer missed unbounded recursion in parser.
Previous answer missed data race in result cache.
Previous answer missed TOCTOU vulnerability in config loading.
Previous answer missed integer division by zero in command routing.

Items.Key: os command injection in admin console|command injection|cwe-78|critical|0.99|enhanced_calc.cpp|602|609|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|system(cmd.c_str());|arbitrary os command execution by an authenticated administrator, leading to full system compromise.|admin executes 'exec <malicious_shell_command>' via the admin interface.|replace system() with safe execution apis (e.g., execve), implement strict command whitelisting, or sanitize/validate inputs.->os command injection in admin console|command injection|cwe-78|critical|0.99|enhanced_calc.cpp|602|609|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|system(cmd.c_str());|arbitrary os command execution by an authenticated administrator, leading to full system compromise.|admin executes 'exec <malicious_shell_command>' via the admin interface.|replace system() with safe execution apis (e.g., execve), implement strict command whitelisting, or sanitize/validate inputs.
